arena.summary: A four-way crossing where false confidence and hesitation both get punished.

phases.name: False Lead
phases.summary: The Beast tries to distract the player with the biggest-looking mover.

phases.name: Left-Hand Bluff
phases.summary: The Beast raises the pressure by making the wrong choice feel urgent.

phases.name: Pedestrian Shade
phases.summary: The hidden vulnerable road user appears and forces the player to slow down.

phases.name: Open Crossing
phases.summary: The Beast loses power when the player obeys the rule cleanly.

intro: The crossing is mine until you learn the order.
The loudest engine is not the law.
phaseShift: You hesitated. I grow on hesitation.
You guessed. I feed on guesses.
defeat: You named the rule. The Beast loses shape.
The crossing opens when priority is obeyed.
victory: The Beast is pinned to the old mistake.

attackLines.summary: A big vehicle looks important but does not own the crossing.
A pedestrian or cyclist appears where the player failed to scan.
The Beast opens a fake gap that closes if the player rushes.
